gallery.title: Daniel & Kevin — Daniel's Wedding Day
gallery.caption: Early 1980s. Daniel Scott "Dan" Wixted (white tux, groom) and brother Kevin Paul Wixted (gray-blue tux). Rochester Wixted line — sons of Bruce & Evelyn.

gallery.title: Baby Kevin with Rod and Bo — Living Room
gallery.caption: Margin stamp JUL • 56. Kevin Paul Wixted (~3 months) with Rod (Rodney Henri Wixted) and Bo (Bruce "Bo" Wixted). Rochester living room, vintage TV.

gallery.title: Evelyn, Baby Kevin & Rod — Chrysler
gallery.caption: July 1956. Evelyn Ruth Jones holds infant Kevin beside Rod (shirtless, shorts). Late-1940s Chrysler coupe with sun visor — Rochester suburban street.

gallery.title: Wixted Family — July 1956 (Buick)
gallery.caption: July 1956. Bruce Wixted Sr., Evelyn, children at mid-1950s Buick — Rod, Bo, baby Kevin, and siblings poolside on a Rochester summer day.

gallery.title: Bruce & Evelyn — Young Couple Outdoors
gallery.caption: Circa 1954–1957. Square-format portrait — Evelyn in sailor-collar dress, Bruce in knit polo. Married 8 Dec 1951; before 1963 move west.

gallery.title: Bruce Wixted Sr. — Formal Portrait
gallery.caption: Circa 1950–1951. Bruce in light suit; Evelyn at frame edge in formal dress — likely wedding era (m. 8 Dec 1951).

gallery.title: Bruce Wixted Sr. — Beach & 1941 Chevy
gallery.caption: Circa 1948. Bruce (~15) with 1941 Chevrolet Special Deluxe on the beach. NY license plate reads 48 · 3M28-98.

gallery.title: Bruce Wixted Sr. — Chevrolet Corvair
gallery.caption: Mid-1960s. Bruce in white shirt and tie, waving from driver's seat of light-blue Corvair coupe. Before Orange County move (1971).

gallery.title: Bruce "Bo" Wixted — Age 6
gallery.caption: 1958. Young Bruce "Bo" Wixted (~6) in toggle coat beside 1957–58 Chevy. NY plate 7M-6403 · EMPIRE STATE 58.

gallery.title: Bo & Lynn — 1957 Chevrolet
gallery.caption: 1957–1959. Bruce "Bo" Wixted and Lynn Louise Wixted in front of 1957 Chevrolet. NY plate 7M-6263 · EMPIRE STATE.

gallery.title: Rod & Bo — 1957 Chevy (Rear View)
gallery.caption: 1957+. Rod and Bo (Bruce Jr.) behind 1957 Chevrolet tail fins. NY plate 3M-2046 · EMPIRE STATE.

gallery.title: Daniel "Dan" — Red Blazer by Impala
gallery.caption: Circa 1964–1966. Young Daniel Scott Wixted (~5) in red blazer by 1963 Impala wagon. NY plate 1845-M (1964–66 issue).

gallery.title: Kevin, Daniel & Sister — First Communion
gallery.caption: 1963+. Kevin (~7), Daniel (~4), and sister in communion dress beside 1963 Impala wagon — formal family occasion.

gallery.title: Wixted Party — Denver, Colorado 1912
gallery.caption: Inscribed "Denver, Colo. 1912." Six men in touring car before neoclassical building — earlier Wixted generation (Henry Joseph Wixted era, b. 1866).

gallery.title: Wixted Man & Indian Motorcycle
gallery.caption: Circa 1915–1920. Pinstripe three-piece suit, bow tie, Indian V-twin — Corning/Rochester Wixted line, earlier generation.

gallery.title: Couple with Model T Touring Car
gallery.caption: Circa 1924–1928. Young couple with Ford Model T — woman's bob and drop-waist dress. Pre–Bruce Sr. (b. 1933); Wixted family archive.

gallery.title: Woman with 1920s Roadster
gallery.caption: Circa 1920s. Woman in cloche hat and fur-collared coat beside touring car. Plate ending ·42. Wixted family archive — earlier generation.

gallery.title: Dan, Matthew & Alexander — WIXTED #22 & #44
gallery.caption: Mid-1990s. Daniel "Dan" Wixted (#44 Fire Hawks) with nephews Matthew (#22 Cubs) and Alexander (#22 Padres). Jersey front/back composite.

gallery.title: Matthew — Toy Mustang
gallery.caption: Mid-1990s (~age 8). Matthew Scott Wixted in blue tank top, toy Ford Mustang on driveway — Southern California.
